rationale: Portugal sees continued indirect benefit from Iran deal momentum on energy prices; no new events directly affecting Portuguese daily life this cycle.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to peace deal
top_events.summary: Sustained Iran deal momentum keeps alive the prospect of lower energy prices in Europe, offering indirect relief to Portuguese households and businesses. Deal still unsigned.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' from Iran war
top_events.summary: US diplomatic signaling reduces risk of a broader Middle East conflict that could spike oil prices and hurt Portugal's import-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Canadian mother sues OpenAI over AI-linked death
top_events.summary: Growing AI liability cases may accelerate EU-level regulation affecting tech services used in Portugal, but impact remains distant and indirect for now.
